build.detail: npm run build succeeded — 121 static pages, 38 doc paths, zero errors

meta_json_completeness.detail: All 6 meta.json files cross-checked against MDX files in each directory — every file listed, no orphans

frontmatter.detail: All 38 MDX pages have title and description in frontmatter

no_technical_jargon.detail: Grep for Server Action, SWR, Provider, hook, component, model, Prisma, Supabase, HeroUI, React, Next.js — zero matches across all 38 pages

mdx_components.detail: Steps/Step and Callout used correctly. Cards/Card used in index.mdx. No Tabs/Tab (unregistered component) found anywhere.

internal_links.detail: All /docs/* links extracted and verified — every link resolves to an existing MDX file

tone_consistency.detail: Sampled 8 pages (prescricao guide, prescricao module, forms, tarefas, textos, agenda, index, sobre). Consistent nutricionista-facing tone, uses 'voce', no jargon, clear tables and callouts.

suggestions.description: Link to plano Pro points to /docs/referencia/modulos-clinicos instead of /docs/referencia/planos-e-precos — works but is slightly off-target for 'plano Pro' context
